title: galium tauricum
intro: Galium tauricum, also known as Kresten, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium tauricum include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and other respiratory conditions, as well as soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. In herbal preparations, Galium tauricum is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusement, and can also be dried to be used in capsules or added to other herbal blends.
